title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.523 - Certificate of nomination to issue, when — certificate of election to issue, when
text:
115.523.  Certificate of nomination to issue, when — certificate of election to issue, when. — 1.  As soon as possible after each primary election, each person nominated for an office at the primary election shall be issued a certificate of nomination.
  2.  As soon as possible after each other election, each person elected to an office at the election shall be issued a certificate of election.
  3.  The certificate shall be issued to each person nominated or elected by the officer responsible for accepting such person's declaration of candidacy.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 12.370) 
Effective 1-01-78
